title: Arirang World Tour — Tokyo Dome Night 2 Live-Broadcast to 3,500+ Cinemas in 75 Countries
detail: BTS closes the Tokyo Dome run on April 18, 2026 (doors 1:00 PM / show 3:00 PM JST) with a global live cinema broadcast to 3,500+ theaters in 75 countries in partnership with Trafalgar Releasing, HYBE, and BigHit — a first for a BTS tour overseas leg. Screenings are available through Cinemark and partner exhibitors worldwide. Night 2 features different encore surprises from Night 1: 'Dope' (tour debut) and 'For You' (first performance since 2018), in place of 'Save Me' and 'Crystal Snow.' The main setlist mirrors Night 1. The Tokyo Dome run marks BTS's triumphant return to Japan after ~7 years and the first overseas stop of the Arirang World Tour.

media.caption: BTS Tokyo Dome Night 2 live-broadcast to 3,500+ cinemas in 75 countries via Trafalgar Releasing
